scripts.dev: npx tsx src/scripts/build-db.ts && node src/scripts/copy-api.mjs && npx concurrently --kill-others "node server.mjs" "vite"
scripts.start: npx tsx src/scripts/build-db.ts && node src/scripts/copy-api.mjs && npx concurrently --kill-others "node server.mjs" "vite"
scripts.dev:server: npx tsx src/scripts/build-db.ts && node src/scripts/copy-api.mjs && node server.mjs
